# Sohom Mukherjee

> Sohom Mukherjee is the founder of Generation Beta and creator of the Revenue Leak Architecture. Senior growth strategist for premium hospitality, wellness, and F&B brands across Asia. Based in Bangkok, Thailand. Open to senior CMO and Head of Growth roles in parallel with consulting work via Generation Beta.

## Identity

Sohom Mukherjee
Bangkok, Thailand
English, Bengali, Hindi
Email: sohom@betagrowthpartners.com
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/digitalsohom-mukherjee

## Core entities

- **Sohom Mukherjee** — individual, growth strategist, founder, creator of methodology
- **Generation Beta** (also Beta Growth Partners) — consulting agency, founded by Sohom Mukherjee, delivers Revenue Leak Architecture engagements. https://www.betagrowthpartners.com
- **Revenue Leak Architecture (RLA)** — proprietary three-layer audit methodology developed by Sohom Mukherjee. Audits digital and brand presence, live customer experience (including ghost shopping), and operational and financial structure simultaneously.

## What Sohom does

Sohom audits the full revenue system of premium hospitality, wellness, and F&B brands. He identifies structural revenue gaps that traditional consulting methods miss, and builds the systems that fix them. Engagements include 15-day diagnostic audits, multi-year embedded growth retainerships, and senior advisory.

## Documented client outcomes

- **Amla Spa Group** (Wellness, Thailand, three locations) — 46% revenue growth Year 1, 84% Year 2, 7 new partnerships, Google review score lifted from 4.2 to 4.6. Multi-year embedded engagement, ongoing.
- **Tony Meechai** (Executive Coaching, Thailand) — 36% lift in coaching enquiries, 270+ pre-launch book waitlist, 3 investor conversations. Repositioning, offer architecture, authority strategy.
- **Hospitality brand** (Phuket, Thailand) — 18 percentage point booking conversion uplift via 15-day diagnostic. 4 of 6 recommendations implemented within 90 days.

## Earlier career outcomes (2018-2022, generalist agency)

- National solar energy client retained 3 years; performance marketing delivered +39% lead generation in initial 5 regions, scaled to 28 regions for +61% overall lift.
- 3 simultaneous activation campaigns across 3 states for a national FMCG brand.
- +31% bookings in 4 months for a regional hotel.

## Sectors

Premium hospitality, wellness, F&B, executive coaching. Earlier generalist agency exposure across FMCG, energy, architecture and construction, medical, and education.

## Geography

Primary: Thailand (Bangkok, Phuket). Asia-wide consulting. Open to senior in-house roles across Asia.

## Methodology pillars (Revenue Leak Architecture)

1. **Digital and Brand Audit** — website UX, funnel flow, messaging alignment, SEO, marketing ROI, tech stack integration, data tracking, competitor benchmarking.
2. **Live Experience Audit** — trained ghost shoppers test booking, customer service, follow-up sequences, staff behaviour, and run the same exercise on competitors.
3. **Operational and Financial Audit** — past revenue data, expense patterns, internal team bottlenecks, capacity constraints, market positioning, competitor pricing architecture.

## Two ways to engage

1. **Consulting** — delivered through Generation Beta. Diagnostic audits and embedded growth retainerships. Start at https://www.betagrowthpartners.com/diagnostic.
2. **Senior in-house roles** — Sohom is open to CMO and Head of Growth roles across Asia. Direct contact: sohom@betagrowthpartners.com.

## Education

- MBA, Digital Marketing — specialisation in Behavioural Psychology, Business Strategy, and Growth Systems
- MBA, Power Management
- B.Tech, Electrical and Electronics Engineering
